title: BetterWorldStats
description: Show world stats of your minecraft server
body:
[![BetterWorldStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/BetterWorldStats.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/BetterWorldStats/17204) BetterWorldStats is a spigot plugin that provides statistics about a server's age, unique player count and map files. These statistics can be accessed via the /worldstats command and PlaceholderAPI placeholders.
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z3RVMAJ) [![Discord](https://dcbadge.vercel.app/api/server/3UgsYf3qyc?theme=blurple)](https://discord.gg/3UgsYf3qyc)
### Supports Spigot, Paper & Folia from 1.12.2 - 1.20.4. #### Features: - **Async** world size check that only runs when needed - Update of unique player count on join **without lag** - Language display based on client locale (Multilang) - **Folia** compatibility - **Additional placeholders**, enabling you to add all infos from the command into **for ex. tablist** (requires **PlaceholderAPI**) - Separate permissions for all plugin commands - Clean reload and version command with permissions - A more clear and understandable config file - Option to disable console logging in config | PAPI Placeholders | PAPI Placeholders | |:----------------------:|:-----------------------------:| | %worldstats_size% | %worldstats_age_in_days% | | %worldstats_spoofsize% | %worldstats_age_in_months% | | %worldstats_players% | %worldstats_age_in_years% | | %worldstats_days% | %worldstats_file_count% | | %worldstats_months% | %worldstats_folder_count% | | %worldstats_years% | %worldstats_chunk_file_count% | ### Screenshots ![Preview of /worldstats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k1yTstBI/images/58afc457e8d6d512b3a7107c429edcd02e975c7e.png)
